# CVEdge

> Free ATS resume scanner and AI-powered CV optimisation platform

CVEdge helps job seekers scan their resume for ATS compatibility, get a real ATS score, fix critical issues with AI, match their CV to job descriptions, and generate tailored cover letters. Free to start. Used by 2,400+ job seekers.

## Core Features

- ATS Score Analysis — instant score across 6 categories with fix suggestions
- AI CV Rewriting — 4 modes: ATS, Impact, Concise, Grammar
- Fix All with AI — rewrites entire CV in one pass to maximise ATS score
- Job Match Scoring — paste a job description and get a match score with gaps
- CV Tailor for JD — rewrites CV to target a specific job description
- Cover Letter Generation — professional, conversational, or confident tone
- Interview Coach — STAR story bank with AI quality scoring and interview prep
- Job Search — 1M+ live jobs with per-listing match scores
- 24 Professional Templates — free and Pro tiers
- 80+ ATS Score Guarantee — money-back guarantee for Pro users

## Plans

- Free: 3 CVs, ATS scans, AI rewrites, job matches, cover letters, PDF export, all templates
- Pro: unlimited everything, no watermark, 80+ score guarantee, priority support
